note_sections.text: Patient is a 67-year-old male with uncontrolled Type 2 diabetes on metformin 500mg twice daily. He presents with fatigue and bilateral leg swelling for the past 3 weeks. Blood pressure is elevated at 158/94 mmHg. He reports increased thirst and frequent urination over the past month.

1. Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus, uncontrolled
2. Hypertension
3. Bilateral leg edema

Metformin 500mg twice daily
Lisinopril 10mg daily
Amlodipine 5mg daily
BP: 158/94 mmHg, HR: 88 bpm, Weight: 98kg, BMI: 32.1, Temperature: 98.6F, SpO2: 97%
